mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(n.notification_id) AS notification_id, n.title, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(n.body, 4000, 1) AS body, n.type, n.is_read, TO_CHAR(n.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS created_at, n.target_c_id AS target_course_id, CASE WHEN n.target_c_no IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(n.target_c_no) || '분반' END AS target_division, TO_CHAR(n.target_request_id) AS target_request_id FROM notification n WHERE ORDER BY n.created_at DESC, n.notification_id DESC

SELECT TO_CHAR(n.notification_id) AS notification_id, n.title, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(n.body, 4000, 1) AS body, n.type, n.is_read, TO_CHAR(n.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS created_at, COALESCE(sender_professor.p_name, sender_student.s_name) AS sender_name, l.no AS course_id, l.subject AS course_name, CASE WHEN c.c_no IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(c.c_no) || '분반' END AS division, n.target_c_id AS target_course_id, CASE WHEN n.target_c_no IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(n.target_c_no) || '분반' END AS target_division, TO_CHAR(n.target_request_id) AS target_request_id, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(cr.reason, 4000, 1) AS request_reason FROM notification n LEFT JOIN student sender_student ON sender_student.s_id = n.sender_s_id LEFT JOIN professor sender_professor ON sender_professor.p_id = n.sender_p_id LEFT JOIN course_request cr ON cr.request_id = n.target_request_id LEFT JOIN class c ON c.c_id = COALESCE(n.target_c_id, cr.c_id) AND c.c_no = COALESCE(n.target_c_no, cr.c_no) LEFT JOIN lecture l ON l.no = c.c_id WHERE AND TO_CHAR(n.notification_id) = #{notificationId}
mapper.update: UPDATE notification n SET n.is_read = 1 WHERE AND TO_CHAR(n.notification_id) = #{notificationId}
